title: Muninn manifest (muninn.yml)
description: The file that marks a directory as a Muninn and records which format version it conforms to (SPEC §5.7, ADR-0002). The one file Odin may rely on to distinguish a Muninn from an ordinary folder (L12). Format versions evolve additively only (ADR-0037): a base adopts new capability by opting in and bumping its own `muninn:` version; it is never migrated implicitly. Unknown fields are permitted (§5).

muninn.description: The Muninn format version this KB conforms to (e.g. 1.0). YAML may parse an unquoted version as a number; both scalar forms are conformant.

derived_self_hash.description: When true, the linter ENFORCES L19 (self_hash vs authored content). The Core stamps self_hash regardless.
